events.summary: Three people are killed and four others are injured, including one critically, in a livestreamed mass shooting when suspected Jalisco New Generation Cartel gunmen open fire on a Lamborghini in Zapopan, Jalisco, Mexico. (BNO News)

events.summary: 29 al-Shabaab militants are killed by the Somali Armed Forces in Jabad Godane, Middle Shabelle, Somalia.

events.summary: Moody's downgrades the credit rating of the city of Budapest, Hungary, to Ba1 and places it on review for a further cut, citing weak liquidity, uncertainty over state transfers, rising solidarity tax obligations, and the partial suspension of European Union funds to Hungary.

events.summary: 2025 Ollantaytambo District train collision Two trains on a rail line between Cusco to Machu Picchu in Urubamba province, Peru, collide,  killing a train driver and injuring 40 passengers. (CBS News)
events.public_summary: 2025 Ollantaytambo District train collision Two trains on a rail line between Cusco to Machu Picchu in Urubamba province, Peru, collide,  killing a train driver and injuring 40 passengers. (CBS News)

events.summary: The South African Police Service confirms at least 41 young men were killed from circumcision procedures during traditional initiation activities over the past two months in South Africa. (MSN)
events.public_summary: The South African Police Service confirms at least 41 young men were killed from circumcision procedures during traditional initiation activities over the past two months in South Africa. (MSN)

events.summary: Turkish police detain 357 people nationwide suspected of being Islamic State members following clashes between the two sides yesterday. (DW)

events.summary: 2025 Cambodian–Thai border crisis Thailand releases 18 prisoners as part of a ceasefire agreement with Cambodia.

events.summary: An Islamic State suicide bomber blows himself up near a checkpoint in Aleppo, Syria, after attempting to reach an Orthodox church, killing one security force member and wounding two more.
